name: x_engagement_metrics
description: Fetch real engagement metrics (impressions, likes, reposts, replies, bookmarks) for one client's already-published X/Twitter post via the X API. Read-only. Fails loud (fail-loud, non-retryable message) when the post_id/tweet_id is invalid or the client's X credentials are missing rather than fabricating a metrics snapshot.

client_id.description: Client this engagement pull is scoped to.

draft_id.description: The post_draft/published_post id this metrics pull is for; threaded into the returned engagement_memory entry.

platform_post_id.description: The X/Twitter platform's own id for the published tweet, from published_post.platforms.x.platform_post_id.
